variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 2034 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59300
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OT 2034 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59300
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 2034 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 59300. Easy to install and replace, the OT 2034 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 218.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 190.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 168.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 260.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 232.0 mm
